decisions.decision: Always append to end of style.css — never insert in the middle
decisions.rationale: Existing CSS has fragile ordering; inserting mid-file risks specificity overrides

decisions.decision: Split-view CSS classes are already defined: .split-view-container, .list-panel, .map-panel
decisions.warning: map-panel MUST be a direct child of split-view-container div. No intermediate allowed.

decisions.decision: Airbnb-style booking button uses coral gradient, NOT flat color
Single product page CSS classes are all defined at end of style.css
$roomContent->categoryName is a direct field from SQL join, NOT a relationship accessor
All complex room queries go through RoomService. Do not duplicate join logic in controllers.
Always use paginate() not get() on hotel-map listings
decisions.why: The blade template calls $currentPageData->lastPage() and currentPage() which require a paginator object

decisions.decision: Map JS variables must be set inline in @section('script') before the map JS files
decisions.hotel_map_vars: var featured_contents = {!! json_encode($featured_contents) !!}; var hotel_contentss = {!! json_encode($currentPageData->items()) !!};

tools_used.browser_subagent: Used extensively for visual verification. Rate-limited frequently — schedule verification at end of session blocks.
tools_used.read_url_content: Effective alternative to browser screenshots for checking page loads without errors.
tools_used.run_command_curl: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8000/{path} | grep 'pattern' -- fast verification of rendered HTML elements

gotchas: Browser subagent hits rate limits (429) frequently — batch visual checks
php artisan route:list fails due to HostController — use php artisan route:cache or skip artisan routes check
style.css has no build step — changes are immediate, no compilation needed
Blade template cache — if changes don't show, run: php artisan view:clear
Map initialization depends on Leaflet being loaded in layout.blade.php
